title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at TCI Express

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at TCI Express
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at TCI Express. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Navi Mumbai-based team.

About TCI Express:
TCI Express is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TCI Express!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
